S.FORM: Furkan Aldemir Furkan Aldemir hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 8, Furkan Aldemir, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *urkan al*emir *urkan al*emir ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč / pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *urkan al*emir, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
